details.productUrlName: March from the Black Gate Showcase Scrolls

customAttributes.description: When March from the Black Gate enters the battlefield and whenever an Army you control attacks, amass Orcs 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also an Orc. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Orc Army creature token first.)
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/3/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: Like a storm, they broke upon the line of the Men of Gondor.
